name: boot
summary: Boot/init: osInitialize, VI/PI manager init, thread creation (main + RSP), message queues, controller init, entry to main game loop (main_game_loop).

functions.name: boot_entry
functions.summary: Game entry point. Calls osInitialize(), creates idle thread (thread 1) with idle_thread_func, starts it. Equivalent to the C entry point called from the reset vector (asm/entry.s).

functions.name: idle_thread_func
functions.summary: Idle/init thread (thread 1). Creates VI manager (with NTSC/PAL video mode setup), PI manager, then creates main thread (thread 3, main_thread_func) and RSP scheduler thread (thread 4, rsp_scheduler_thread). Flag sBootFlags can skip starting main thread. Drops priority to 0 and spins forever.

functions.name: main_thread_func
functions.summary: Main game thread (thread 3). Creates message queues for: PI DMA (gPiMessageQueue), SP events (sSpEventQueue), DP events (sDpEventQueue), VI retrace (sViEventQueue). Initializes controllers via controller_init(). Creates controller and RSP message queues, starts RSP thread, then enters the game loop via main_game_loop().

globals.name: sBootFlags
globals.summary: Flag to skip starting the main thread (when non-zero). Used for debugging/dev.

globals.name: sIdleStack
globals.summary: Stack buffer for idle thread (thread 1), size IDLE_STACK_SIZE (0x400).

globals.name: sIdleThread
globals.summary: OSThread for idle/init thread (thread 1).

globals.name: sMainThread
globals.summary: OSThread for main game thread (thread 3).

globals.name: sMainStack
globals.summary: Stack buffer for main thread, size MAIN_STACK_SIZE (0x2000).

globals.name: sRspThread
globals.summary: OSThread for RSP scheduler thread (thread 4).

globals.name: sRspStack
globals.summary: Stack buffer for RSP thread, size RSP_STACK_SIZE (0x400).

globals.name: sPad11B0
globals.summary: Unused BSS padding, size 0x11B0.

globals.name: sPiMgrMesgs
globals.summary: Message array (8) for PI manager message queue.

globals.name: sPiMgrMesgQueue
globals.summary: Message queue for PI manager (DMA callbacks).

globals.name: sViEventQueue
globals.summary: Message queue for VI retrace events.

globals.name: sViMesg
globals.summary: Message (1) for VI event queue.

globals.name: gPiMessageQueue
globals.summary: Global PI DMA message queue. Used by memory.c (DMA wait) and huffman.c (DMA).

globals.name: sSpEventQueue
globals.summary: Message queue for SP (RSP) completion events (OS_EVENT_SP).

globals.name: sDpEventQueue
globals.summary: Message queue for DP (display processor) completion events (OS_EVENT_DP).

globals.name: sContMesgQueue
globals.summary: Message queue for controller/SI events. Drained by rsp.c during task processing.

globals.name: gRspMessageQueue
globals.summary: Global RSP scheduler message queue. Used for sending/receiving RSP tasks between rsp.c and audio.c.

globals.name: sSchedMesgs
globals.summary: Message (1) for scheduler (PI DMA) queue.

globals.name: sSpMesg
globals.summary: Message (1) for SP event queue.

globals.name: sDpMesg
globals.summary: Message (1) for DP event queue.

globals.name: sContMesgs
globals.summary: Message (1) for controller event queue.

globals.name: sRspMesgs
globals.summary: Message array (4) for RSP scheduler queue.
